title: • Main Performer: Controls core “dangerous” elements and the structural
content:
• Main Performer: Controls core “dangerous” elements and the structural flow of songs.
  • Rotating Band Members: Handle melodic parts, solos, and synchronize with the main performer.
  • Audience: Aggregated input drives mood, tempo, and tonal shifts.
  • Software Infrastructure: Modular “song” environments allow rotating participation and audience-driven variations.

  • ---

    • 2. Objectives

    1. Define a Contextual Awareness Subsystem that supports dynamic band rotations and interactive audiences.
    2. Enable secure, real-time audience and performance data relays.
    3. Build a modular live performance architecture supporting streaming and touring.
    4. Deliver live experiences actively shaped by audience input.
    5. Produce a prototype performance engine demonstrating nightly band changes and audience influence.

    ---

    3. Project Scope


    In Scope


    • Development of software layers for main performer, rotating band, and audience input.
